hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】10xResearch 认为，比特币暴跌应归咎于通胀上升，而非策略；【FINANCE】热点就业报告显示美联储进一步降息遥不可及，主席沃什面临政策考验；【FINANCE】美联储主席沃什在央行任命首批员工，其中包括《Project 2025》作者。

items.title: Blame bitcoin's tumble on rising inflation, not Strategy, 10xResearch argues
items.summary: The main driver behind bitcoin's weakness was ETF selling after red-hot April U.S. inflation data, 10x's Markus Thielen argued. The bounce may hinge on Wednesday's CPI data, he said.
items.title_zh: 10xResearch 认为，比特币暴跌应归咎于通胀上升，而非策略
items.summary_zh: 10x 的 Markus Thielen 认为，比特币疲软背后的主要驱动力是 4 月份美国通胀数据炙手可热后 ETF 的抛售。他表示，反弹可能取决于周三的消费者物价指数数据。

items.title: Hot jobs report puts Fed cuts further out of reach as Chair Warsh faces policy tests
items.summary: Another big jobs report in May has swept aside the possibility of interest rate cuts anytime soon.
items.title_zh: 热点就业报告显示美联储进一步降息遥不可及，主席沃什面临政策考验
items.summary_zh: 五月份的另一份重要就业报告排除了近期降息的可能性。

items.title: Fed Chair Warsh makes first hires at central bank, including 'Project 2025' author
items.summary: The new Fed chair has made his first hires. One wrote the Fed chapter in the conservative policy blueprint "Project 2025."
items.title_zh: 美联储主席沃什在央行任命首批员工，其中包括《Project 2025》作者
items.summary_zh: 新任美联储主席已经任命了他的第一批人选。其中一人在保守派政策蓝图“2025 年计划”中撰写了美联储章节。

items.title: Bitcoin is cratering, but a new Wall Street crypto hype is on the rise
items.summary: As bitcoin dropped to its lowest price since 2024, investors flock to a new type of crypto investment linked to the hyperliquid platforms, HYPE ETFs.
items.title_zh: 比特币正在崩溃，但华尔街新的加密货币炒作正在兴起
items.summary_zh: 随着比特币跌至 2024 年以来的最低价格，投资者纷纷涌向与超流动性平台相关的新型加密货币投资——HYPE ETF。

items.title: TON Strategy’s May staking haul tops 3.3 million TON as network upgrades take effect
items.summary: TON Strategy made approximately $5.6 million in staking rewards for May and is staking nearly all of its over 227 million tokens.
items.title_zh: 随着网络升级生效，TON Strategy 5 月质押量突破 330 万 TON
items.summary_zh: TON Strategy 5 月份的质押奖励约为 560 万美元，并且几乎所有超过 2.27 亿个代币都被质押。

items.title: Where investors may find the next 'big wave' for AI trade
items.summary: Tim Urbanowicz, chief investment strategist at Innovator from Goldman Sachs Asset Management, tackles the AI boom.
items.title_zh: 投资者可能会在哪里找到人工智能贸易的下一个“大浪潮”
items.summary_zh: 高盛资产管理公司 Innovator 首席投资策略师 Tim Urbanowicz 应对人工智能热潮。

items.title: Iran and Israel say they will pause strikes but warn of retaliation if ceasefire breached again
items.summary: Israel's PM says his country is holding fire "at the moment", after Iran's armed forces said they had stopped military action.
items.title_zh: 伊朗和以色列表示将暂停袭击，但警告称如果再次违反停火协议将进行报复
items.summary_zh: 以色列总理表示，在伊朗武装部队表示已停止军事行动后，以色列“目前”暂不开火。

items.title: Live updates: Bitcoin tops $63,000 as Strategy adds $100 million BTC in latest purchase
items.summary: Meanwhile, Strive bought 32 bitcoin, the same number Strategy dumped last week.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：Strategy 在最新购买中增加了 1 亿美元比特币，比特币突破 63,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 与此同时，Strive 购买了 32 枚比特币，与 Strategy 上周抛售的数量相同。

items.title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
items.summary: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.
items.title_zh: Endava 如何围绕人工智能代理重新设计软件交付
items.summary_zh: 了解 Endava 如何使用 AI 代理、ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 来加速软件交付、自动化工作流程并在整个企业中构建 AI 原生文化。

items.title: Chinese mining CEO says Strategy can survive a $30,000 bitcoin without selling
items.summary: Jiang Zhuoer of BTC.TOP called the week's sell-off speculation overblown, arguing Strategy's small debt and the design of its preferred shares let it keep buying.
items.title_zh: 中国矿业首席执行官表示Strategy可以在不出售比特币的情况下生存3万美元
items.summary_zh: BTC.TOP 的江卓尔称本周的抛售猜测有些言过其实，并认为 Strategy 的小额债务及其优先股的设计使其能够继续买入。

items.title: Influential research firm that caused AI stock meltdown lays out Hyperliquid as 'compelling' idea
items.summary: Unlike most crypto, Hyperliquid actually generates cash flow and has a token buyback mechanism, says Citrini Research
items.title_zh: 导致人工智能股票崩盘的有影响力的研究公司将 Hyperliquid 视为“令人信服”的想法
items.summary_zh: Citrini Research 表示，与大多数加密货币不同，Hyperliquid 实际上会产生现金流并具有代币回购机制

items.title: Coinbase strategist says institutions aren’t panicking about bitcoin, ‘love it even more’ at lower prices
items.summary: Family offices and sovereign wealth funds continue accumulating bitcoin despite the recent selloff, according to Coinbase's John D'Agostino.
items.title_zh: Coinbase策略师表示，机构并不对比特币感到恐慌，而是在价格较低的情况下“更喜欢它”
items.summary_zh: Coinbase 的约翰·达戈斯蒂诺 (John D'Agostino) 表示，尽管比特币最近遭到抛售，但家族办公室和主权财富基金仍在继续积累比特币。

items.title: Morgan Stanley will soon open its trillion-dollar wealth management funnel to AI agents
items.summary: Morgan Stanley's move is one of the earliest instances of a major Wall Street bank opening its platforms to external AI tools.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利即将向人工智能代理开放万亿美元财富管理渠道
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利的举动是华尔街主要银行向外部人工智能工具开放其平台的最早实例之一。

items.title: Watch: Trump tells BBC Netanyahu did not defy him
items.summary: In a call with the US president, the BBC’s Sarah Smith asked Trump about the war in Iran and his relationship with the Israeli leader.
items.title_zh: 观看：特朗普告诉 BBC 内塔尼亚胡并没有违抗他
items.summary_zh: 在与美国总统的通话中，英国广播公司的莎拉·史密斯向特朗普询问了伊朗战争以及他与以色列领导人的关系。

items.title: Israel Halts Iran Strikes After Trump Claims Progress Toward Nuclear Talks, Officials Say
items.summary: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said that Israel’s “fire is on hold” after a phone call with President Trump. Iran also said it would cease its attacks but, like Israel, warned it was ready to resume.
items.title_zh: 官员称，特朗普声称核谈判取得进展后，以色列停止对伊朗的打击
items.summary_zh: 以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡在与特朗普总统通电话后表示，以色列“火势已暂停”。伊朗也表示将停止袭击，但与以色列一样，警告称已准备好恢复袭击。

items.title: A ‘Miraculous Transformation’: How Kim Jong-un Fortified North Korea
items.summary: He used the pandemic to ruthlessly tighten his grip on the country. Then he energized its economy by leveraging Russia’s war in Ukraine.
items.title_zh: “奇迹般的转变”：金正恩如何强化朝鲜
items.summary_zh: 他利用疫情无情地加强了对国家的控制。然后，他利用俄罗斯在乌克兰的战争为经济注入活力。

items.title: Why Iran Risked an Attack on Israel
items.summary: Iran’s leaders want to show they are serious about defending their Hezbollah allies in Lebanon and maintaining the regional balance of power, analysts say.
items.title_zh: 伊朗为何冒着袭击以色列的风险
items.summary_zh: 分析人士称，伊朗领导人希望表明他们认真捍卫黎巴嫩真主党盟友并维持地区力量平衡。

items.title: China Reasserts Itself, to Contain North Korea’s Tilt Toward Russia
items.summary: On a rare visit to North Korea, China’s leader, Xi Jinping, projected unity but also sought to remind Kim Jong-un that he is the senior partner in their alliance.
items.title_zh: 中国重申自己立场，遏制朝鲜向俄罗斯倾斜
items.summary_zh: 在对朝鲜的罕见访问中，中国领导人习近平展现了团结，但也试图提醒金正恩，他是两国联盟中的高级伙伴。

items.title: Humanity Protocol token crashes more than 80% after a $32 million private-key hack
items.summary: The decentralized identity project said attackers compromised the keys of a foundation member and are dumping the stolen H tokens for ether.
items.title_zh: 价值 3200 万美元的私钥被黑客攻击后，Humanity Protocol 代币崩溃了 80% 以上
items.summary_zh: 该去中心化身份项目表示，攻击者泄露了一名基金会成员的密钥，并将窃取的 H 代币转为以太币。

items.title: Forehead tattoos and alcohol dares: Inside the dark underbelly of crypto's memecoin craze
items.summary: Users are being paid to shave their heads, chug liquor and interview homeless people on camera, raising questions about whether Pump.fun's latest product rewards creativity or exploitation.
items.title_zh: 额头纹身和酗酒：加密货币模因币热潮的黑暗底层
items.summary_zh: 用户被雇来剃光头、大口喝酒、在镜头前采访无家可归的人，这引发了人们对 Pump.fun 的最新产品是否奖励创造力或剥削的疑问。

items.title: Sam Bankman-Fried officially asks Trump for a presidential pardon
items.summary: The fallen crypto mogul serving a 25-year sentence filed a clemency petition, betting on Donald Trump's history of crypto pardons even though the president had told him not to count on one.
items.title_zh: 萨姆·班克曼-弗里德正式请求特朗普总统赦免
items.summary_zh: 这位正在服刑 25 年的倒下的加密货币大亨提交了一份宽大处理请愿书，押注于唐纳德·特朗普的加密货币赦免历史，尽管总统告诉他不要指望赦免。

items.title: The startup killer: Ledger CTO says the EU's crushing compliance costs are choking Web3 innovation
items.summary: Industry insiders warn that MiCA's steep financial barriers are choking early-stage innovation.
items.title_zh: 初创公司杀手：Ledger 首席技术官表示，欧盟高昂的合规成本正在阻碍 Web3 创新
items.summary_zh: 业内人士警告说，MiCA 严重的财务障碍正在阻碍早期创新。

items.title: Aave chief defends protocol's 'resilience' after $8.45 billion bank run
items.summary: The founder of the largest DeFi platform blamed "third-party” entities for decentralized finance’s vulnerabilities, while independent data highlights severe gaps in Aave’s own risk architecture.
items.title_zh: Aave 首席执行官在 84.5 亿美元银行挤兑后捍卫协议的“弹性”
items.summary_zh: 最大 DeFi 平台的创始人将去中心化金融的漏洞归咎于“第三方”实体，而独立数据则凸显了 Aave 自身风险架构中的严重缺陷。

items.title: Strategy shareholders approve semi-monthly dividends for STRC preferred stock
items.summary: "Paying dividends on STRC twice a month is designed to stabilize price, dampen cyclicality, drive liquidity, and grow demand for STRC," Strategy's CEO said.
items.title_zh: 战略股东批准STRC优先股半月股息
items.summary_zh: Strategy 首席执行官表示：“每月两次向 STRC 支付股息，旨在稳定价格、抑制周期性、推动流动性并增加对 STRC 的需求。”

items.title: Former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried officially files for a presidential pardon from Trump
items.summary: Sam Bankman-Fried is pressing ahead with his bid for a presidential pardon, even after President Trump said he has no plans to grant clemency.
items.title_zh: FTX 前首席执行官 Sam Bankman-Fried 正式向特朗普申请总统赦免
items.summary_zh: 萨姆·班克曼-弗里德仍在继续争取总统赦免，尽管特朗普总统表示他不打算给予特赦。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Humanity (H)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #159.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：人性 (H)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 159 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Sahara AI (SAHARA)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #453.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：撒哈拉人工智能 (SAHARA)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#453。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #10.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 10。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Citrea (CTR)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #818.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Citrea (CTR)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#818。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Economic Research Exchange
items.summary: OpenAI launches the Economic Research Exchange to study AI’s impact on jobs, productivity, and the economy. Applications are now open for selected research projects.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 经济研究交流中心简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 发起经济研究交流，以研究人工智能对就业、生产力和经济的影响。选定的研究项目现已开放申请。

items.title: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a blueprint for U.S. governance of frontier AI, proposing a federal framework for safety, resilience, and national security.
items.title_zh: 前沿人工智能民主治理蓝图
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 勾勒出美国前沿人工智能治理的蓝图，提出了安全、弹性和国家安全的联邦框架。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: MIT researchers teach AI models to interpret charts
items.summary: The new ChartNet training dataset could improve the accuracy of vision-language models that help analyze business trends or interpret scientific figures.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员教人工智能模型解释图表
items.summary_zh: 新的 ChartNet 训练数据集可以提高视觉语言模型的准确性，帮助分析业务趋势或解释科学数据。

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Bitcoin set to slump to new lows for 2026 after recent sell-off, traders forecast
items.summary: The cryptocurrency is likely to break below its lows hit in early February, traders on prediction market Kalshi believe.
items.title_zh: 交易员预测，在最近的抛售之后，比特币将在 2026 年跌至新低
items.summary_zh: 预测市场 Kalshi 的交易员认为，加密货币可能会跌破 2 月初触及的低点。

items.title: Stock market jitters remain amid tech fears and renewed Middle East attacks
items.summary: Markets in Asia are hit by a tech sell-off, and oil is volatile as Iran and Israel launch attacks on each other.
items.title_zh: 由于科技担忧和中东新一轮袭击，股市依然紧张
items.summary_zh: 亚洲市场受到科技股抛售的打击，而随着伊朗和以色列相互发动攻击，石油价格也出现波动。

items.title: Scientist Charged With Conspiring to Smuggle Mpox Virus Into U.S.
items.summary: The virologist was stopped at the Detroit airport after working in Congo during an mpox epidemic. His lawyer said the material was for research.
items.title_zh: 科学家被指控密谋将痘病毒走私到美国
items.summary_zh: 这名病毒学家在刚果麻疹流行期间工作后在底特律机场被拦截。他的律师说这些材料是为了研究。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR gains 12.3% as almost all assets trade higher
items.summary: Bittensor (TAO), up 12% from Friday, joined NEAR Protocol (NEAR) as a top performer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：NEAR 上涨 12.3%，几乎所有资产交易都走高
items.summary_zh: Bittensor (TAO) 较周五上涨 12%，加入 NEAR Protocol (NEAR) 行列，成为表现最佳的股票。

items.title: Wallets linked to Humanity Protocol drained for over $32 million, token plunges 89%: onchain analyst
items.summary: Out of the stolen amount, $23.7 million has been swapped for Ethereum, while around $7.9 million remains in H tokens.
items.title_zh: 与 Humanity Protocol 相关的钱包损失超过 3200 万美元，代币暴跌 89%：链上分析师
items.summary_zh: 在被盗金额中，2370 万美元已换成以太坊，而约 790 万美元仍为 H 代币。

items.title: Brazen bitcoin kidnapping and carjacking co-conspirator pleads guilty, faces up to 20 years in prison: DOJ
items.summary: Six men from Florida carjacked Sushil and Radhika Chetal's Lamborghini Urus, beat the couple and briefly detained them.
items.title_zh: 比特币绑架和劫车同谋认罪，面临最高 20 年监禁：司法部
items.summary_zh: 来自佛罗里达州的六名男子劫持了苏希尔和拉迪卡·切塔尔的兰博基尼 Urus，殴打了这对夫妇并短暂拘留了他们。

items.title: Crypto has ‘limited utility’ in solving AI’s trust and payment issues, IC3 researchers say
items.summary: The academic researchers attempt to debunk idea that giving AI agents access to crypto wallets has the ability to make them autonomous.
items.title_zh: IC3 研究人员表示，加密货币在解决人工智能信任和支付问题方面“效用有限”
items.summary_zh: 学术研究人员试图揭穿这样的观点：让人工智能代理访问加密钱包能够使其实现自主。

items.title: MetaMask debuts Agent Wallet giving AI bots self-custody access to Ethereum
items.summary: Consensys-backed MetaMask is rolling out a non-custodial wallet for AI agents for general availability this summer.

items.summary_zh: Consensys 支持的 MetaMask 将于今年夏天推出一款适用于人工智能代理的非托管钱包。

items.title: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind
items.summary: GPT-Rosalind advances life sciences research with enhanced biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry expertise, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow capabilities.

items.summary_zh: GPT-Rosalind 通过增强的生物推理、药物化学专业知识、基因组学分析和实验工作流程功能推进生命科学研究。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: This startup wants to reduce payment friction on prediction markets
items.summary: EDGE Markets is announcing two new products to solve payment issues in prediction markets, the company shared exclusively with CNBC.

items.summary_zh: EDGE Markets 向 CNBC 独家透露，该公司宣布推出两款新产品，以解决预测市场的支付问题。

items.title: Hong Kong's IPO boom is developing a performance problem
items.summary: As Hong Kong vies with Wall Street to be the top IPO market, a growing number of pre-debut runups turn sour after their listing.
items.title_zh: 香港IPO热潮正引发绩效问题
items.summary_zh: 随着香港与华尔街争夺最大的IPO市场，越来越多的上市前股价在上市后表现不佳。

items.title: China poaches more AI talent from the U.S. as it eyes the next 'super-app'
items.summary: Tencent Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu, who joined the company from OpenAI, said Friday he aims to pursue artificial general intelligence.
items.title_zh: 中国从美国挖走更多人工智能人才，着眼下一个“超级应用”
items.summary_zh: 从 OpenAI 加入腾讯的首席人工智能科学家姚舜宇周五表示，他的目标是追求通用人工智能。

items.title: Kalshi is building a prediction markets 'Bloomberg Terminal' for high-end traders, source says
items.summary: The prediction market platform is developing the platform to create a singular platform for its highly engaged traders.

items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台正在开发该平台，为其高度参与的交易者创建一个单一的平台。

items.title: Israel and Iran flare-up could strengthen Tehran's negotiating hand
items.summary: Iran appears emboldened by the outcome and its leaders may sense Trump's appetite for risk is low.
items.title_zh: 以色列和伊朗的冲突可能会增强德黑兰的谈判筹码
items.summary_zh: 伊朗似乎因这一结果而变得更加大胆，其领导人可能会感觉到特朗普的风险偏好很低。

items.title: SpaceX's stock market blast-off could be Musk's biggest gamble yet
items.summary: SpaceX is preparing for a stock market debut that could transform the company, the wider market and Elon Musk's fortune.

items.summary_zh: SpaceX 正在为股票上市做准备，这可能会改变公司、更广泛的市场和埃隆·马斯克的财富。

items.title: At least 35 dead after major earthquake strikes southern Philippines
items.summary: The magnitude-7.8 quake triggered small tsunami waves in the Philippines, Indonesia and Japan.

items.summary_zh: 7.8级地震在菲律宾、印度尼西亚和日本引发了小规模海啸。

items.title: Trump booed in New York as he becomes first US president to attend NBA Finals
items.summary: The catcalls came after ticketholders faced airport-style security to enter the venue at Madison Square Garden.
items.title_zh: 特朗普成为第一位出席 NBA 总决赛的美国总统，在纽约遭到嘘声
items.summary_zh: 购票者在进入麦迪逊广场花园的场馆时要面对机场式的安检，随后引发了阵阵嘘声。

items.title: 'City's gonna be crazy:' Knicks run electrifies NYC, as Trump's attendance locks down arena
items.summary: The Knicks' stunning winning streak has energised New York as the team prepares for the third game of the NBA Finals at home.
items.title_zh: “这座城市将会变得疯狂：”尼克斯队的比赛让纽约市兴奋不已，因为特朗普的出席锁定了竞技场
items.summary_zh: 尼克斯队令人惊叹的连胜给纽约队带来了活力，球队正在主场准备 NBA 总决赛的第三场比赛。

items.title: Eriksen at home and 'doing well' after collapse
items.summary: Christian Eriksen says he is "doing well" and is at home with his family following his collapse in Sunday's game against Ukraine.
items.title_zh: 埃里克森在家并在崩溃后“表现良好”
items.summary_zh: 克里斯蒂安·埃里克森在周日对阵乌克兰的比赛中倒下后表示，他“状况良好”，目前正在家里与家人团聚。

items.title: Somali referee Artan barred from entering US
items.summary: Omar Artan, who was set to be the first Somali to referee at the World Cup finals, is dropped from the list of officials after he was denied entry to the United States.
items.title_zh: 索马里裁判阿尔坦被禁止入境美国
items.summary_zh: 奥马尔·阿尔坦原本是第一位在世界杯决赛中担任裁判的索马里人，但在被美国拒绝入境后，他被从裁判名单中除名。

items.title: Artisanal or Exploitative? Unraveling the Story of Mexico’s World Cup Jerseys
items.summary: Mexicans are enraged after viral videos claimed Adidas exploited Indigenous women to sew World Cup jerseys. We traveled into the mountains to speak to the artisans themselves.
items.title_zh: 手工还是剥削？揭秘墨西哥世界杯球衣的故事
items.summary_zh: 据称阿迪达斯利用土著妇女缝制世界杯球衣的视频在网上疯传，墨西哥人感到愤怒。我们走进山里与工匠们交谈。

items.title: At Least 32 Dead After Earthquake and Landslide in the Philippines
items.summary: A 7.8-magnitude quake struck off the island of Mindanao, causing widespread destruction and a deadly landslide. More than 100 others were injured and tens of thousands displaced.
items.title_zh: 菲律宾地震和山体滑坡造成至少32人死亡
items.summary_zh: 棉兰老岛发生里氏 7.8 级地震，造成大面积破坏和致命的山体滑坡。另有 100 多人受伤，数万人流离失所。

items.title: Nikol Pashinyan Wins Re-election in Armenia
items.summary: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan overcame a pressure campaign by Moscow and was on track to win a mandate to move ahead on peace talks that President Trump helped broker.
items.title_zh: 尼科尔·帕希尼扬 (Nikol Pashinyan) 赢得亚美尼亚连任
items.summary_zh: 总理尼科尔·帕希尼扬克服了莫斯科的压力，有望赢得授权，推进特朗普总统帮助斡旋的和平谈判。

items.title: The 15-Hour Fight With Iran Showed the Bind Israel Is In
items.summary: As it braces for a possible U.S.-Iranian peace deal, Israel now knows that if it responds forcefully to attacks by Hezbollah, Iran may strike Israel with missiles.
items.title_zh: 与伊朗 15 小时的战斗表明以色列陷入困境
items.summary_zh: 在为可能达成的美伊和平协议做准备时，以色列现在知道，如果它对真主党的袭击做出强有力的回应，伊朗可能会用导弹袭击以色列。

items.title: Vance Blames Migrant ‘Invasion’ for UK Stabbing
items.summary: British officials accused Vice President JD Vance of trying to “stir up division” in his comments on the murder of Henry Nowak, whose killer was sentenced to life in prison last week.

items.title: Bitmine adds 127,000 ether, bringing treasury to 5.54 million ETH as Tom Lee calls crypto selloff ‘superficial’
items.summary: Bitmine purchased 126,971 ETH for about $207M, lifting its treasury to 5.54M tokens worth $9B as ether trades near 30% below its April highs.
